ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact person for the campaign */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company launching the campaign */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Brief description of the campaign */,
  "goal" REAL /* Financial goal of the campaign */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Amount pledged by backers */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the campaign (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Total number of backers for the campaign */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the campaign is based */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency used for the campaign */,
  "launched_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the campaign was launched */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the campaign */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Indicates if the campaign is a staff pick */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Indicates if the campaign is in the spotlight */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the campaign */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the campaign */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., fixed, flexible) */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL of the project */,
  "project_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the project image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., USD, CAD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency (e.g., United States Dollar) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate for the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., food, technology) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign being updated */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., funding, milestone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_updates_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("cf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supported campaign */,
  "backer_name" TEXT /* Name of the backer */,
  "backer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reward chosen by the backer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("cf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign offering the reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_amount" REAL /* Amount required to receive the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the backer making the pledge */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign being pledged to */,
  "pledge_amount" REAL /* Amount of the pledge */,
  "pledge_date" TEXT /* Date of the pledge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("cf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign being tracked */,
  "funding_progress" REAL /* Current funding progress of the campaign */,
  "backer_count" INTEGER /* Current number of backers for the campaign */,
  "average_pledge_amount" REAL /* Average pledge amount for the campaign */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_analytics_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("cf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign being discussed */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sender of the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the receiver of the message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("cf_id")
)
